title: RecipientViewRequest
description: Request body for generating an embedded recipient signing URL.

authenticationMethod.description: The authentication method used to verify the recipient. Must match the authentication method used when the recipient was added.

email.description: The email address of the recipient.

userName.description: The full name of the recipient.

clientUserId.description: The client user ID of the embedded signer.

returnUrl.description: The URL to redirect the signer to after the signing session ends. DocuSign appends event query parameters.

pingUrl.description: A URL that DocuSign pings during the signing session to confirm the parent frame is active.

pingFrequency.description: Frequency in seconds for ping requests.

frameAncestors.description: URLs allowed to iframe the signing session (CSP frame-ancestors).

messageOrigins.description: Origins allowed to receive postMessage events.

securityDomain.description: The security domain for the signing session.
